name: Christopher Knight Home Rust Water and UV-Resistant Rectangle Acacia Wood Outdoor Patio Dining Table Teak Finish: Weather-Resistant Patio Furniture
description:
Utilize your outdoor space in a practical and pretty new way with our stylish outdoor dining table. Straight, subtly splayed legs add an industrial touch, while the slat panel design of the sturdy acacia wood tabletop promises endless rustic flair. Thanks to the straightforward, minimalist silhouette, the fine details of this table can truly shine. Whether you style it with contrasting seating for an eclectic look or matching chairs for a more coordinated approach, this table is sure to be the perfect finishing touch.

MODERN INDUSTRIAL: Our dining table incorporates a powder-coated frame with a rich wood top to create an understated modern industrial design. Featuring beautiful slat paneling, this table offers a chic aesthetic to any home.

ACACIA WOOD TOP: Made with acacia wood that brings a sleek and exotic look to your space, this durable hardwood naturally withstands the elements and will not darken over time. Acacia wood is perfect as a solid, heavy frame that resists wear and tear.

SLAT PANEL DESIGN: The tabletop features beautiful slat paneling, giving this set a sophisticated, classic look. This perfectly complements the powder-coated iron frame, giving this set an edgy aesthetic.

WEATHER RESISTANT: This dining table is designed and tested to resist mild weather conditions. We always advise covering, storing, or providing other protection to our furniture in the event of heavy or repeated exposure to the elements, including water and UV rays.

DIMENSIONS: Choose an accessory that is the perfect size for you and your furniture. This dining table is 69.00" W x 32.25" D x 29.50" H. You will love how much your space can transform with the simple addition of this charming table.
